---
title: "Weekly Lecturer Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  lecturer_id: ""
  week_id:     ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "weekly_lecturer_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_data.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_alerts.R"))

lecturer_id <- params$lecturer_id
week_id     <- params$week_id

stats    <- weekly_lecturer_analysis(lecturer_id, week_id)
lecturer <- fetch_lecturer(lecturer_id)
wp       <- fetch_weekly_period(week_id)
alerts   <- fetch_open_alerts_for_lecturer(lecturer_id)
```

---

**Lecturer:** `r lecturer$full_name`  
**Week:** `r wp$week_number` / `r wp$year` (`r wp$start_date` – `r wp$end_date`)

---

## 1. Class Overview

```{r overview}
knitr::kable(data.frame(
  Metric = c("Sessions This Week", "Total Students Present",
             "Avg Engagement Score", "Avg Concentration"),
  Value  = c(stats$n_sessions,
             stats$total_students,
             ifelse(is.na(stats$avg_engagement), "N/A",
                    sprintf("%.2f", stats$avg_engagement)),
             ifelse(is.na(stats$avg_concentration), "N/A",
                    sprintf("%.3f", stats$avg_concentration)))
), col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
```

## 2. Per-Session Engagement

```{r session-eng}
if (!is.null(stats$session_details) && nrow(stats$session_details) > 0) {
  sd <- stats$session_details %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(course_code, "\n", format(as.POSIXct(actual_start),
                                                    "%a %d")))
  ggplot(sd, aes(x = reorder(label, actual_start), y = avg_eng)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#42A5F5") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.6, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Session", y = "Avg Engagement",
         title = "Engagement per Session This Week") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
} else {
  cat("No session data available.")
}
```

## 3. Top / Bottom Students

```{r top-bottom}
student_eng <- with_connection(function(con) {
  dbGetQuery(con, sqlInterpolate(con,
    "SELECT ses.student_id,
            CONCAT(u.first_name,' ',u.last_name) AS name,
            AVG(CASE WHEN ses.concentration='high'   THEN 85
                     WHEN ses.concentration='medium' THEN 55
                     WHEN ses.concentration='low'    THEN 25
                     ELSE 10 END)                    AS avg_conc,
            COUNT(*)                                 AS n_snaps
       FROM student_emotion_snapshots ses
       JOIN users u ON u.id = ses.student_id
       JOIN lecture_sessions ls ON ls.id = ses.session_id
       JOIN weekly_periods wp ON wp.id = ?wid
      WHERE ls.lecturer_id = ?lid
        AND ses.captured_at BETWEEN wp.start_date
            AND DATE_ADD(wp.end_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
      GROUP BY ses.student_id, u.first_name, u.last_name
      ORDER BY avg_conc DESC",
    wid = week_id, lid = lecturer_id))
})

if (nrow(student_eng) > 0) {
  n_show <- min(5, nrow(student_eng))
  top <- head(student_eng, n_show)
  bot <- tail(student_eng, n_show)
  cat("### Top Students\n")
  print(knitr::kable(top[, c("name","avg_conc")],
        col.names = c("Student", "Avg Concentration")))
  cat("\n### Bottom Students\n")
  print(knitr::kable(bot[, c("name","avg_conc")],
        col.names = c("Student", "Avg Concentration")))
} else {
  cat("No student data available.")
}
```

## 4. Alert Summary

```{r alerts}
if (nrow(alerts) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(alerts[, c("student_name","alert_type","severity","triggered_at")],
               col.names = c("Student","Type","Severity","Triggered At"))
} else {
  cat("No open alerts.")
}
```

## 5. Teaching Tips

```{r tips}
avg_eng <- stats$avg_engagement
if (!is.na(avg_eng)) {
  if (avg_eng < 0.4) {
    cat("- Engagement is low this week. Consider more interactive activities.\n")
    cat("- Introduce brief comprehension checks mid-lecture.\n")
  } else if (avg_eng < 0.65) {
    cat("- Engagement is moderate. Try varying lecture pacing.\n")
  } else {
    cat("- Great engagement this week! Keep up the current approach.\n")
  }
}
if (nrow(alerts) > 3) {
  cat("- Several alerts triggered. Review at-risk students individually.\n")
}
```
